headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Cummins (CMI) After Its 119% One Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Cummins at a last close of US$616.14 still offers value, you are not alone. This article will help you frame that question clearly. The stock has shown strong momentum, with returns of 12.1% over 7 days, 10.8% over 30 days, 18.0% year to date and 119.5% over the last year, as well as 182.4% over 3 years and 162.6% over 5 years. Recent coverage has focused on Cummins as a key player in capital goods and industrial equipment. Investors are paying close attention to...

headline: Earnings Preview: What to Expect From Cummins' Report
summary: Cummins will release its first-quarter earnings next month, and analysts anticipate a single-digit profit dip.

headline: C-COM Adopts Semi-Annual Financial Reporting
summary: Ottawa, Ontario--(Newsfile Corp. - April 10, 2026) - C-COM Satellite Systems Inc., (TSXV: CMI) (OTCQB: CYSNF) (the "Company") a leading global provider of commercial grade mobile auto-deploying satellite antenna systems, announced today that it has elected to rely on Coordinated Blanket Order 51-933 and move to semi-annual financial reporting ("SAR").Coordinated Blanket Order 51-933 allows eligible venture issuers listed on the TSX Venture Exchange to voluntarily move from a quarterly to a...

headline: Is Cummins' (CMI) Pushback on Governance Proposals Revealing a Deeper Board-Power Trade-Off?
summary: On April 2, 2026, Cummins Inc. filed its definitive proxy statement, urging shareholders to vote against proposals on reviewing its charitable giving risks and separating the Board Chair and CEO roles, ahead of the May 12 annual meeting. The shareholder push on governance and charitable spending comes just after Cummins reported robust results in its Distribution and Power Systems segments, highlighting a contrast between financial execution and investor priorities on oversight and social...
